security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: blob: data: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first knowledge base for engineering specs.
bundle.longDescription: Specdex is a desktop application for curating, searching, and back-referencing engineering specs and codes from PDF source documents — fully local, no AI, no cloud.
